extra.reason: Resolved: ccusage backend, related wiring, dead multi-agent plumbing, compare_usage.swift script, and stale README documentation are removed; app code no longer references ccusage.

Resolved: blog/session usage aggregation now computes provider-aware cost_usd via ModelPricing for Anthropic and OpenAI models, with regression coverage for Codex auto-review, GPT 5.5 fast, Anthropic pricing, and unknown model behavior.
Provider enum, UsageWindowType codex cases, ProviderUsageSnapshot, TokenCount.reasoningTokens implemented; Kit builds clean

Live multi-provider token/cost done: UsageLogSource protocol, CodexLogSource, OpenCodeLogSource (SQLite), TokenUsageService aggregator with provider-aware cost + byProvider, auto-detect wiring. macOS+widgets build clean. SwiftData persistence split to follow-up.

CodexUsageService reads 5h/weekly rate-limit windows from newest rollout (used_percent/resets_at/plan_type) → ProviderUsageSnapshot. Verified vs real data: plan prolite, 5h 51%, 7d 20%. macOS builds clean.
Live multi-provider token/cost aggregator shipped (re-confirming closed).
Auto-detect wiring + Codex menu-bar toggle done; full enable/disable settings optional.
OpenUsage-style provider cards shipped on macOS (popover + dashboard). iOS/widgets → ClaudeMeter-d01.

OpenUsage-style sidebar + ProviderDetailView shipped (popover + dashboard): rail switches overview/per-provider; detail shows links, windows w/ status dots, Today/Yesterday/30d, usage-trend sparkline (bars), per-model %. Builds clean (macOS+widgets). Spark/Credits omitted (not in local logs).
Expired Codex rate-limit windows now refresh to zero usage and roll their reset timestamp forward; added focused Codex usage service tests. App build succeeds.

Compared against CodexBar, OpenUsage, upstream Codex, abtop, and local Codex rollout logs. Updated parser to map windows by window_minutes, support reset_at/reset_after_seconds variants, and added coverage for these cases. App build succeeds; test target remains blocked by stale OutageTrackingTests.
Verified OpenCode Go dashboard quota behavior and added optional dashboard parser/service integration.
Menu bar Codex indicator now prefers the 5-hour Codex quota window.
Replaced stale rollout-file parsing with live /wham/usage fetch; 6 tests pass, live value 25% (was 0%)
Removed syncToKeychain call and method from MacOSCredentialService; macOS no longer writes to its own keychain, eliminating the per-launch authorization prompt. Build succeeds.

Routed blog-sync token through /usr/bin/security CLI in BlogUsageSyncService (load/save/delete). Stable Apple-signed binary holds the keychain grant, so no per-launch prompt. Stale in-process keychain items deleted; user re-enters token once after updating. Build succeeds.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented LiteLLM-backed pricing cache with proxy/hosted map refresh and wired it into token import, live aggregation, and blog sync cost calculation.

Fixed returnsNilForUnknownModel (assert static fallbackRates for gpt-4 since live LiteLLM map prices it) and initialStateIsCorrect (stash/restore cached snapshot UserDefaults keys shared with the real app). Full suite passes on Xcode 27/macOS 27.

Implemented OAuth 2.1/PKCE blog sign-in (BlogOAuthService + ASWebAuthenticationSession), wired into UsageViewModel/Settings with static token fallback. Endpoints/scopes/resource verified against ruchern.dev Better Auth provider docs. macOS build succeeds.
Implemented 1h cache tier, fast-mode premium, sidechain dedup; tiered 200K dropped (current models flat). 10 tests pass, app builds.
Closed
Closed
Closed
Closed
Per-turn granularity implemented in CodexLogSource
Closed
Closed
code_review_rate_limit surfaced as codexReviews window. additional_rate_limits[] (dynamic names) and credits (balance, not a reset window) deferred — need richer model than UsageWindow.

429 now degrades gracefully: ClaudeAPIService already retains stale data + shows retry message; added CodexError.rateLimited (429 + Retry-After) and ViewModel now keeps cached Codex/OpenCode data on rate-limit instead of hiding the column.
Reverted aeea0f7; flat pricing restored, 1h-cache 2x kept, reprice version bumped to 3. PR #15.
Added claude-sonnet-5 rate table and fallback matching in ModelPricing
Implemented providerID-based OpenCode attribution and verified with focused xcodebuild tests.
Duplicate of ClaudeMeter-92j (full-description P1 issue)

Ported CodexBar /_server JSON RPC fetcher into OpenCodeGoUsageService: server-fn endpoint, JSON-first recursive parser (rolling/weekly/monthly, ~10 key aliases, used/limit fallback), regex fallback (now quote-tolerant), workspace auto-discovery (GET->POST), 4-case error taxonomy, looksSignedOut, redirect guard, null-payload handling. DashboardConfig.workspaceID now optional (cookie-only valid). outageErrorCode updated for new enum. 24 new tests (JSON/regex/config/signout/redirect/4xx/5xx/auto-discover). Full macOS suite green. Zen-balance deferred to 1.1.

Ported Codex Spark + Credits: CodexUsageService now decodes additional_rate_limits (named per-model UsageWindows, spark primary->.codexSpark, secondary->.codexSparkWeekly via CodexAdditionalRateLimitMapper approach) and credits.balance (-> creditsRemaining). Additive model change in ClaudeMeterKit: UsageWindowType.codexSpark/.codexSparkWeekly, optional name on UsageWindow, ProviderUsageSnapshot.creditsRemaining. planName handles snake_case (free_workspace->Free Workspace). ProviderDetailView shows Spark windows + credits bar; DashboardTabView/MenuBarView wired. 5 new tests. Full suite green. Closes ccz/pay.

Added CodexLogSourceTests (9 tests: disjoint token split, last-token-count-wins, file-mod-date fallback, filename fallback for session id, default model fallback, skip-no-tokens, skip-malformed-lines, multi-file aggregation, ignores non-rollout files). Fixed CODEX_HOME consistency: codexSessionsDirectories now honors $CODEX_HOME/sessions before the default ~/.codex/sessions, matching codexAuthFileURLs. Full suite green.

Added Codex + OpenCode outage classification suites (17 tests) covering the previously-untested outageErrorCode branches at UsageViewModel.swift:111-124 (CodexError.serviceUnavailable/.serverError 5xx vs 4xx/unauthorized/sessionExpired/networkError/invalidResponse/maxRetries; OpenCodeError.serverError/.apiError 5xx vs 4xx/invalidCredentials/parseFailed/networkError). Added 4 lifecycle tests verifying preserve-cached-snapshot-on-outage and clear-on-success for both Codex (via URLProtocol mock, accounting for 3x retry) and OpenCode (via MockTransport). Full suite green.

Fixed: registerClientIfNeeded now blocks redirects (NoRedirectDelegate, matching cachedClientIsValid) so a 3xx on /register can't land on a non-JSON 200 and break client_id extraction — the root cause of 'client_id never persists'. Added robust extractClientID (top-level / nested client.client_id / camelCase clientId) and detailed failure logging (status + content-type + body). 8 regression tests in BlogOAuthClientIDExtractionTests. If it recurs, the new logging captures the exact request/response for diagnosis.
Done in 1.0.0 P2: CodexUsageService now decodes additional_rate_limits (named per-model windows incl. Codex Spark) and credits.balance -> creditsRemaining. ProviderDetailView surfaces them.
Done in 1.0.0 P2: Codex Spark 5h (.codexSpark) + Spark weekly (.codexSparkWeekly) windows + credits bar rendered in ProviderDetailView.
Done: auto-release.yml has cut v0.14.3 through v0.14.15 automatically on push to main. Pipeline is live.
Done: the file-based credentials card is no longer in SettingsTabView (grep confirms no credentialsFound/fileExists/reveal-in-Finder). MacOSCredentialService reads from Keychain.
Done in 1.0.0 P5: OpenCode cookie + workspace ID now have a dedicated Settings section (SecureField + TextField) backed by UserDefaults, with a re-authenticate hint on cookie expiry.

Done: CodexLogSourceTests (P3) + Codex/OpenCode outage classification & lifecycle suites (P4) deliver the multi-provider test coverage. TokenLogEntry provider-field migration remains scoped under eme (1.x).
Done: claude-fable-5 pricing shipped in v0.14.13 (CHANGELOG confirms 'Add claude-fable-5 pricing to ModelPricing fallback table').

OAuth bug (sck): registerClientIfNeeded now blocks redirects (NoRedirectDelegate) so a 3xx on /register can't break client_id extraction; added robust extractClientID (top-level/nested/camelCase) + detailed failure logging; 8 regression tests. OpenCode settings UI: cookie + workspace ID section in SettingsTabView backed by UserDefaults (@AppStorage); DashboardConfig.load() reads UserDefaults first; DependencyContainer always creates the service so a cookie pasted post-launch is picked up; VM openCodeAuthError flag surfaces a re-auth prompt on 401/403. Triage: closed sck/ccz/pay/5rr/w0f/6em/c56/oy2/2j8(core); re-prioritized AppKit/Codex-headless/polish/iOS-multi-provider/SwiftData to p4 (1.x). Full suite green.
